path.description: Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error.

message.description: Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem.

ErrorDetail.description: ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

oneOf.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

command.description: Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command.

description.description: Description explains the suggested next step in plain language.

NextAction.description: NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round.

review_title.description: ReviewTitle is the human-readable title for the round when one exists.

decision.description: Decision is the aggregate review decision for the round.

oneOf.description: BlockingFindings lists the findings that currently block progression.

blocking_findings.description: BlockingFindings lists the findings that currently block progression.

oneOf.description: NonBlockingFindings lists the findings that were recorded without blocking progression.

non_blocking_findings.description: NonBlockingFindings lists the findings that were recorded without blocking progression.

ReviewAggregate.description: ReviewAggregate is the command-owned aggregate artifact for a completed review round.

round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

aggregate_path.description: AggregatePath is the path to the updated aggregate artifact.

local_state_path.description: LocalStatePath is the plan-local state cache path.

ReviewAggregateArtifacts.description: ReviewAggregateArtifacts lists the artifacts touched by `harness review aggregate`.

slot.description: Slot is the stable reviewer slot identifier.

dimension.description: Dimension is the human-readable review dimension label.

severity.description: Severity is the finding severity label.

title.description: Title is the short human-readable title of the finding.

details.description: Details is the full review finding explanation.

locations.description: Locations optionally lists lightweight repo-relative source anchors for the finding, such as "path/to/file.go", "path/to/file.go#L123", or "path/to/file.go#L1-L3".

ReviewAggregateFinding.description: ReviewAggregateFinding is one aggregate finding annotated with its slot and dimension context.

ok.description: OK reports whether the command succeeded.

command.description: Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload.

summary.description: Summary is the concise human-readable outcome description.

artifacts.description: Artifacts points to the updated aggregate artifacts.

review.description: Review is the aggregate decision payload when aggregation succeeded.

oneOf.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

next_actions.description: NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order.

errors.description: Errors lists hard failures that prevented the command from succeeding.

ReviewAggregateResult.description: ReviewAggregateResult is the JSON result returned by `harness review aggregate`.
